title: Helios Envelope Manifest
description: Durable manifest defining the protected and mutable envelopes for Helios command-gate integrity verification. The sidecar file helios-envelope.sha256 contains the SHA256 of this JSON file.

created_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of manifest creation or last rebaseline.

rebaselined_by.description: Identity of the rebaseline actor. Must be 'human' for trusted rebaselines.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about the rebaseline.

paths.description: All protected paths including manifest/helios-envelope.json and manifest/helios-envelope.sha256. Paths are relative to the gate root.

hashes.description: SHA256 hashes of protected files. Keys are relative paths. The manifest and sidecar are listed in paths but NOT in hashes (avoids self-referential hashing).

dirs.description: Mutable runtime directories: pending/, inflight/, evidence/, blocked/.
